title: maesobotrya staudtii
intro: Maesobotrya staudtii, also known as the African bush mango, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Maesobotrya staudtii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Maesobotrya staudtii include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically prepared from the leaves, bark, or fruit of the plant.
